findings.summary: ephemeral_disk=200_000 below Modal minimum (524,288 MiB) — plan value wrong, validate failed
findings.evidence: Modal error: Function disk request out of bounds: 200000 MiB. Must be between 524288 and 3145728 MiB.
findings.proposed_fix: Omit ephemeral_disk unless >500 GiB needed. Default disk handles BAM staging. Modal skill gotcha #12 already documents range.

findings.summary: scripts/data/ caught by data/ gitignore rule — had to move BED to config/
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: never create subdirs named data/ under tracked directories. Use config/ for reference data files.

findings.summary: VCF GT comparison treated phased 0|1 as different from unphased 0/1 — inflated discordance 18x (542K vs 29K real)
findings.evidence: compare_callsets.py output: 11.7% discordance → 0.63% after phase normalization. 95% of gene-region discordance was phase notation only.
findings.proposed_fix: Phase-normalize genotypes in any VCF comparison: gt.replace('|', '/') then sort alleles. Add to CLAUDE.md pitfalls.

findings.summary: Other active agent committed my new files into its own commit during canary gate debugging — git staging collision
findings.evidence: git show --stat dbd03fe shows compare_callsets.py and gene_entity_regions.bed in pid 76920's commit
findings.proposed_fix: Known multi-agent git contention (3 prior improvement-log entries). No new fix — startup hook already warns.

findings.summary: Spent ~8 tool calls investigating plan's '22 gene entities' count when script already had 74 ACMG SF genes
findings.evidence: Grep/Read calls on condition_registry.py, entity dirs, HGNC files — all unnecessary
findings.proposed_fix: When plan references a count that doesn't match existing code, use existing code's list. Plan was written before implementation.
